title: notholaena ochracea
intro: Notholaena ochracea, also known as Copper Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Notholaena ochracea include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe and protect the skin, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate joint pain. Herbal preparations of Copper Fern include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
